name: Sweet Potato

pros.title: excellent tuber-category fit
pros.explanation: Strong vitamin support and gentler carb behaviour make it one of the cleanest tuber-category foods.

pros.title: fairly filling for the calories
pros.explanation: A practical strength for an energy food.

pros.title: easy to use as a wholefood staple
pros.explanation: Works cleanly in meals without needing much rescue from toppings or processing.

cons.title: naturally sweeter than some tubers
cons.explanation: Still fine, but it is not the lowest-sugar energy food in the category.

cons.title: healthiness depends on preparation
cons.explanation: Heavy added fats or sugary toppings can change the practical outcome.

cons.title: protein contribution is light
cons.explanation: Like most tubers, it is not doing much in the protein lane.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
